title: paronychia lugdunensis
intro: Paronychia lugdunensis, also known as French paronychia, is a perennial herb in the family Nyctaginaceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Paronychia lugdunensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Paronychia lugdunensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
